nasb.text: But I will deliver you on that day,” declares the Lord, “and you will not be given into the hand of the men whom you dread.

esv.text: But I will deliver you on that day, declares the Lord, and you shall not be given into the hand of the men of whom you are afraid.

cnv.text: 但到了那日，我必拯救你；你必不至交在你所懼怕的人手裡。’這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 耶和华说，‘但那时，我必拯救你，使你不致落在你所惧怕的人手中。
